evidence_refs: Name/code similarity: "KanbanBuilderIsland" matches "AI Chat Builder surface (seed) — AI Chat is seeded as a future Builder capability, not a full AI runtime in MVP. It gives users a branded, in-canvas assistant entry point that will later help generate and structure DCX content. — AI entry point lives in the Kanban Builder Island. Clicking opens a branded sticky popup (resizable, minimizable, sticky on canvas) using the shared popup shell. Future capabilities: read proposal, extract phases/actions/tasks, break tasks into subtasks, assign channels, complete structure from objectives/templates/strategy metadata. AI output must never directly mutate Builder data; it must go through review/preview/apply + normal validation." (score: 0.85)
